textByHashes.23d10da7113dd7b823332583e56f3189a40844cd: ...and he says that it's of the greatest urgency.
textByHashes.b41f4cff9f7cfb06fb2dc73473959c0f9d2fb2be: Sorry human. We're currently engaging in important official business. You'll need to come back another time.
textByHashes.6d7afff8e6cb921ab64c49eeddb2a6d2592ac329: This is . They've been helping out in Lovakengj recently.
textByHashes.8e95cb168ae382401f956ae1dac460fc000e0408: Well hang on. Maybe they could help us with this urgent matter.
textByHashes.0a03c71ca425ff14d6749a4bc0fb495676f496a7: The one we were just discussing. The one with the Doors of Dinh.
textByHashes.23150adf8a3bdfa2be5607db9caac9743686227d: Human, we have a job for you.
textByHashes.e1eec91705439c211e87849145dca837aa763b5e: One of the finest smiths in Lovakengj, Undor, has been investigating issues with the Doors of Dinh. We've just received word that he has found the problem. However, he has requested we send assistance.
textByHashes.352aea5e26e4918100a9612e2721eeaad6ef2aae: Could you go to him and see what help he needs? You'll find him right outside the Doors of Dinh, north of Arceuus.
textByHashes.e91c3d3a03f4789b7a91a6db9814ece61b352ee7: I'm Councillor Unkar, one of the members of the Kourend Council. We are responsible for running the entire Kingdom of Great Kourend.
textByHashes.605836bb77bc714c28acb2a7cd6846417740ddba: It's important for the Council to maintain a good relationship with the rulers of the five cities. Although it is the Council that rules, we can only do so with their support.
textByHashes.60817147d7ceea0d071a44170bf11532fe70cafb: I'm here to help Lady Lovakengj out and to make sure she has everything she needs to rule effectively.
textByHashes.319a45d139f8b0600550a6c71ea1f93bff219100: They are a great set of doors built by a legendary smith, Dinh, in the early days of Kourend. They were created to imprison a deadly beast known as the Wintertodt.
textByHashes.b8559c9c45e82978514f15f811768e14c2ad1cdd: Unfortunately, although the Doors kept the beast contained for over a thousand years, they've recently started to fail. The master smith, Undor, was sent to investigate.
textByHashes.e527ac1f1d33b8aafe59b0e755cf2a442a0ba719: Sorry human. We're currently engaging in important official business. If you don't have anything of importance to say, you'll need to come back another time.
textByHashes.96d95ccb8f326b10e491633dd9bde29341450461: Human, we have given you a job to do. What else do you need?
textByHashes.62c5da6ad3c56c46ab25c663824c41c5022ea87b: Go and speak to Undor and see what he has discovered. You'll find him outside the Doors of Dinh, north of Arceuus.
textByHashes.1f69fa3a32126e99b910c3a9a5bc6e91d9905586: We asked them to go and see what help Undor needed at the Doors of Dinh.
textByHashes.0351f602f60c55ae3783bcffbe4773534eb1399d: Well this is excellent news. With the Doors fixed, the Wintertodt poses a far smaller threat to Kourend. Well done.
textByHashes.6e6a5f3b8877c4f7be368e0770c812bbe2796c91: I think they want a reward, Lady Lovakengj.
textByHashes.12f93c4f91d18c1e275016fbfb9775d5367830a3: Thank you for helping to repair the Doors of Dinh. Kourend is a safer place because of you.
textByHashes.f6d7f1b70c2a4c77f974a182e685bdef48742ef5: It's important for the council to maintain a good relationship with the rulers of the five houses. Although it is the council that rules, we can only do so with their support.
textByHashes.b12c3197e7670589d9c5f5506ff084d74b8c9144: They are a great set of doors built by the legendary smith, Dinh, in the early days of Kourend. They were created to imprison a deadly beast known as the Wintertodt.
textByHashes.cab6cf0d7d636c73ba3ccec1bc24cc0c88356363: Unfortunately, the doors were recently damaged, putting Kourend at risk. The master smith Undor, managed to repair them though, something he couldn't have done without you.
